ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
libboost_python_devel:
- '1.90'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
root_cxx_standard:
- '20'
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version

about.description:
FastFrames is a package aimed at processing ntuples produced by
TopCPToolkit, or a similar CP algorithm based framework, into histograms or
ntuples.  FastFrames rely on ROOT's RDataFrame to do the event loop
processing.  The code allows users to define their own columns in a minimal
way while using all the functionality of the processing.
about.summary: FastFrames: RDataFrames for ATLAS analysis ntuples

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "7.0.0"
  root_version_spec: ">=6.38.00"

package:
  name: fastframes
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://gitlab.cern.ch/atlas-amglab/fastframes/-/archive/v${{ version }}/fastframes-v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 8a7ae28296cfc18c5fdafd863c54b4a8432bdcdd5fd028661763b390b2aa6e2c
  patches:
    - use-usr-bin-env-for-all-python-scripts.patch
    - install-python-files.patch

build:
  number: 3
  skip:
    - win
  script:
    - cmake ${CMAKE_ARGS} -DPython_EXECUTABLE=$PYTHON -DPython_INCLUDE_DIR=$PREFIX/include/python${PY_VER} -DFASTFRAMES_PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR=$SP_DIR -DONNXRUNTIME_INCLUDE_DIRS=$PREFIX/include/onnxruntime -DONNXRUNTIME_LIBRARIES=$PREFIX/lib/libonnxruntime.so -S . -B build
    - cmake --build build --clean-first --parallel="${CPU_COUNT}" --verbose
    - cmake --install build

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler("cxx") }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - cmake
    - make
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - python
        - root_base ${{ root_version_spec }}
        - root_cxx_standard
  host:
    - root_base ${{ root_version_spec }}
    - root_cxx_standard
    - libboost-python-devel
    - python
    - onnxruntime-cpp
  run:
    - python
    - pyyaml

tests:
  - package_contents:
      files:
        - bin/fast-frames.exe
  - script:
      - FastFrames.py -h

about:
  license: BSD-2-Clause
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: 'FastFrames: RDataFrames for ATLAS analysis ntuples'
  description: |
    FastFrames is a package aimed at processing ntuples produced by
    TopCPToolkit, or a similar CP algorithm based framework, into histograms or
    ntuples.  FastFrames rely on ROOT's RDataFrame to do the event loop
    processing.  The code allows users to define their own columns in a minimal
    way while using all the functionality of the processing.
  homepage: https://gitlab.cern.ch/atlas-amglab/fastframes
  repository: https://gitlab.cern.ch/atlas-amglab/fastframes
  documentation: https://atlas-project-topreconstruction.web.cern.ch/fastframesdocumentation/latest/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - p-queue
    - kratsg
